testcase.name: tc_auth_003_loginAsHrManager

failure.message: Unexpected HTTP status. Body: {"success":false,"message":"Invalid email or password","timestamp":"2026-05-09T15:02:00.727755103"} expected [200] but found [401]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Unexpected HTTP status.
